name: Wheatie Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the Wheaties with enough flour to form a thin batter.
2. Pour in the milk and whisk until smooth.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, stirring gently after each addition.
4. Stir in the baking powder and salt.
5. Gently fold in the melted butter.
6. Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat.
7. Using a ladle to scoop out portions of batter, place them onto the hot griddle.
8. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges are set.
9. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until golden brown on the other side.
10. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
